channel.title: Base Weight Bulletin
channel.description: Fresh takes for ultralight backpackers and thru-hike dreamers.

item.title: "thru hike food planning" in practice: a real-world field test

item.title: "lower base weight cheap" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "lower base weight cheap" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why ultralight backpackers are rethinking Food
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how ultralight backpackers and thru-hike dreamers approach food — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: What to watch next in Shelters: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping shelters for ultralight backpackers and thru-hike dreamers.
